annotations.summary: Portfolio weighted position diverges (Backtest − Production) by more than 0.05 for 10m. See dashboard: Strategy PnL — L5 Portfolio.

model.rawSql: SELECT a.t AS time, a.wp - b.wp AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) t, sum(position * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) wp FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 FINAL WHERE ts >= now() - INTERVAL 17 MINUTE AND toStartOfMinute(ts) IN (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 FINAL WHERE ts >= now() - INTERVAL 17 MINUTE GROUP BY toStartOfMinute(ts) HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) GROUP BY t) a INNER JOIN (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) t, sum(position * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) wp FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 FINAL WHERE ts >= now() - INTERVAL 17 MINUTE AND toStartOfMinute(ts) IN (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 FINAL WHERE ts >= now() - INTERVAL 17 MINUTE GROUP BY toStartOfMinute(ts) HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) GROUP BY t) b USING (t) ORDER BY time

annotations.summary: Portfolio weighted position diverges (Production − Real-Trade) by more than 0.05 for 10m. See dashboard: Strategy PnL — L5 Portfolio.

model.rawSql: SELECT a.t AS time, a.wp - b.wp AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) t, sum(position * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) wp FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 FINAL WHERE ts >= now() - INTERVAL 17 MINUTE AND toStartOfMinute(ts) IN (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 FINAL WHERE ts >= now() - INTERVAL 17 MINUTE GROUP BY toStartOfMinute(ts) HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) GROUP BY t) a INNER JOIN (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) t, sum(position * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) wp FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_real_trade_v2 FINAL WHERE ts >= now() - INTERVAL 17 MINUTE AND toStartOfMinute(ts) IN (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_real_trade_v2 FINAL WHERE ts >= now() - INTERVAL 17 MINUTE GROUP BY toStartOfMinute(ts) HAVING countDistinct(underlying) = 8) GROUP BY t) b USING (t) ORDER BY time
